data.name: Cult 87
data.detailed_description:
Play as detective Max washed ashore on a dark nefarious cult island. Your ship has sunk you must explore the island and Black Blood Castle to unravel it's mysteries. Defeat the erotic, sexualized and voluptuous cult women that follow the calling of the Void. Save the missing women and escape the island.

Cult 87 plays like an old school shooter with 2D and 3D elements. The 2D elements use a 8 sided sprite system to give you the feeling of 3D like Doom. Some actions require a selection to the storyline giving you some freedom to choose what you want to say or interact with.

Features
    Unlock erotic animations
    Animations rendered to 8 sides to give look of 3D
    Find hidden secrets and collect keys and items
    Find magic books to cast spells
    Connect with Lovense sex toys while viewing the erotic animations

data.short_description: Play as detective Max washed ashore on a dark nefarious cult island. Explore the island and Black Blood Castle to unravel it's mysteries. Save the missing women and escape the island. It plays like a FPS with slower paced action.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5, AMD Ryzen or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Only runs on 64 bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7, AMD Ryzen or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Only runs on 64 bit systems

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5, AMD Ryzen or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Only runs on 64 bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i7, AMD Ryzen or equivalent
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Only runs on 64 bit systems
